title: AronHS Season 2 Modpack
description: The Modpack I Use in my Hardcore Season 2 series
body:
This is the modpack i use for my new minecraft hardcore season 2 series, all the mods below are the exact same mods i use in my videos

If i ever decide to add more, ill be sure to update the modpack, so you can follow along if your watching/playing.

**Please enjoy the modpack :)**
